rule_metadata.name: ft_office_open_xml
rule_metadata.author: Jason Batchelor
rule_metadata.desc: Simple metadata attribute indicative of Office Open XML format. Commonly seen in modern office files.

rules.rule_text:
rule ft_office_open_xml
{
	meta:
		author = "Jason Batchelor"
		company = "Emerson"
		lastmod = "20140915"
		desc = "Simple metadata attribute indicative of Office Open XML format. Commonly seen in modern office files."

	strings:
		$OOXML = "[Content_Types].xml"

	condition:
		$OOXML at 30
}
